name: Pumpkin Pie Squares
recipeInstructions:
Combine flour, rolled oats, 1/2 cup brown sugar and 1/2 cup butter in a mixing bowl. Mix until crumbly using an electric mixer on low speed. Press into an ungreased 9 x 13 pan. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
Combine pumpkin, evaporated milk, eggs, sugar, salt and spices in a mixing bowl; beat well. Pour into the crust. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
Combine pecans, 1/2 cup brown sugar and 2 tablespoons butter. Sprinkle over the pumpkin filling. Return to oven to bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until the filling is set. Cool in the pan and cut into 2-inch squares. Makes 2 dozen.
